tech_news.title: #New40k – Grot Week reveals: Day 1 - Warhammer Community
tech_news.description: Warhammer Community has been invaded by Gretchin – let’s check out the first one through the breach.

tech_news.title: Xbox at Summer Game Fest Play Days 2026: Meet the Developers of This Year’s Featured Games - Xbox Wire
tech_news.description: For Summer Game Fest Play Days, Xbox has assembled a phenomenal crew of developers from all over the world. Come and meet the games and teams bringing their demos to the show.

tech_news.title: French insider claims Star Fox is possibly a multiplayer spinoff, new mainline entry due 2027 - My Nintendo News
tech_news.description: Update: The sources for this are all over the place, though it appears there was no mention of a mainline game for 2027. We shall just have to wait and see if this game gets revealed or not.

tech_news.title: Here is the first leaked image of the new Sony 100-400mm f/4.5 GM lens! - SonyAlphaRumors
Pokémon Champions producer Masaaki Hoshino says the game has to deal with more "limitations" when it comes to graphics - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: Pokémon veteran and Champions producer Masaaki Hoshino says he understands criticism of graphics, but points out devs had to deal with "limitations".

tech_news.title: Microsoft says Outlook.com outage is causing sign‑in failures - BleepingComputer
tech_news.description: Microsoft is investigating an ongoing Outlook.com outage that is causing intermittent signing issues and preventing customers from accessing their mailboxes.

tech_news.title: Jarod Bourdeau’s ORB “Off-Road Bike” - BIKEPACKING.com

tech_news.title: Noctua says "feel free" to 3D print your own Noctua fans after releasing public CAD models online - PC Guide
tech_news.description: Noctua has long been a go-to brand for PC building enthusiasts, and now, the company has released a library of free 3D models to explore.

tech_news.title: Meet the players who lost big money on Peter Molyneux’s failed Legacy - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: After millions in NFT sales, the hyped “play to earn” game was effectively dead in weeks.
